---
title: "Page 4 - Concept Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec03-sp04"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec03"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Concept

_Add a clear explanation of the key idea, concept, or definition here._

## Example

_Provide an example to illustrate the concept._

## Why it matters

_Explain the importance or practical application of this concept._

---



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction or instructions for this accordion-based explanation here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.accordion}
**Detailed Explanation**

<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the detailed content or explanation that should be hidden until clicked._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the accordion here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this true false._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="true_false"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

<!-- editable:start questions -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the true_false format here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this conceptual explanation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.math-explanation data-variant="conceptual"}
**Conceptual Logic**

$$ e = mc^2 $$

**Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a conceptual explanation._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec03-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Overview Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec03-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Activity Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
